evals.prompt: Create a minimum Jinkō trial from model cm-123 that saves Drug and run it only if sanity passes.
evals.expected_output: Creates a simple output set from Drug, creates the trial from the model, checks sanity/status before run, uses --apply/--run gates, and polls with wait_until_completed.

evals.prompt: Find a completed trial in my project, print its summary, and download timeseries and scalar results as pandas dataframes.
evals.expected_output: Uses client.list_trials, filters status == completed, calls trial.results.summary, trial.output_ids, trial.results.timeseries(...).to_dataframe, and trial.results.scalars(...).to_dataframe.

evals.prompt: Why can't I launch this trial when my data table armScope does not match the protocol arms?
evals.expected_output: Explains trial sanity constraints, specifically that data-table armScope values must match protocol arms, and recommends fixing data table or protocol before launch.
